name: World of Hyatt Business Credit Card
title: World of Hyatt Business Credit Card (Chase)
text: Card: World of Hyatt Business Credit Card (Chase) BEST FOR BUSINESS OWNERS WHO ARE HYATT LOYALISTS Pros: This card can provide serious value to Hyatt loyalists looking to spend their way toward status perks or unlock a 10% bonus points feature,Cardholders can receive up to $100 in statement credits for Hyatt purchases each year Cons: This card doesn't offer any free night certificates or automatic status beyond the lowest level Why we chose it: The World of Hyatt Business Credit Card is a mid-tier hotel credit card that can provide serious value to Hyatt loyalists looking to spend their way toward status perks or unlock a 10% points rebate feature. However, there are trade-offs you should consider before putting that much spending on a credit card that doesn’t offer any free night certificates or automatic status beyond the lowest level. Whether or not this card is for you will entirely depend on whether you want to spend your way toward status or if you’d rather earn more points with another card. (Partner offer) Who it's good for: This card is geared toward small-business owners who are World of Hyatt loyalists and keen to utilize their business spending to earn elite status with Hyatt. That’s because the card’s best perks are achieved through (sometimes significant) annual spending. Annual fee: $199 Recommended credit: 670-850 Rewards: 1 - 9X points Intro bonus: 60,000 Bonus Points after you spend $5,000 on purchases in your first 3 months from account opening. Points valuation: 1.7 APR: 19.24% - 27.74% Variable,19.24% - 27.74% Variable,28.49% Variable,Up to 29.99% Benefits: Receive World of Hyatt Discoverist status for as long as your account is open. Give the gift of Discoverist status to up to five employees. Earn 5 Tier-Qualifying night credits toward status and Milestone rewards for every $10,000 you spend in a calendar year. Spend $50 or more at any Hyatt property and earn $50 statement credits up to two times each anniversary year. Spend $50,000 in a calendar year and get 10% of your redeemed points back for the rest of the year, on up to 200,000 points redeemed. With discounts on standard room rates at all participating Hyatt hotels, the Hyatt Leverage program can offer companies savings up to 15% off standard rates at participating Hyatt hotels worldwide. Coverage is primary when renting for business purposes and provides reimbursement of the vehicle for theft and collision damage for most cars in the U.S. and abroad. You can be reimbursed up to $1500 per person and $6,000 per trip for your pre-paid, non-refundable passenger fares, if your trip is canceled or cut short by sickness, severe weather and other covered situations. Covers your new purchases for 120 days against damage or theft up to $10,000 per claim and $50,000 per account. Extends the time period of the U.S. manufacturer's warranty by an additional year, on eligible warranties of three years or less. Get one-year complimentary DashPass, a membership for both DoorDash and Caviar that provides unlimited deliveries with $0 delivery fee and lower service fees on eligible orders. Once you have activated your membership, you will receive a $10 off discount each calendar quarter at checkout on one eligible non-restaurant order on DoorDash. Transfer partners: This card earns Chase points Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/hotel/hyatt/world-of-hyatt-business-credit-card-review/
